meaning: v.商量,商议,请教,参考,考虑
examples: He needed to consult with an attorney.
Consult your doctor about how much exercise you should get.
If your skin becomes red, sore or very scaly, consult your doctor.
They consult with residents, businesses and police on whether CCTV is appropriate in an area.
Dreyling, who says he did consult his CPA, has appealed to the Minnesota Supreme Court.
